faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Woodhaven?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Woodhaven range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Woodhaven, Queens?
faqs.answer: Woodhaven homes commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent due to the area's mature trees and older wooden structures. Our technicians identify the species and customize treatment accordingly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant extermination service in Woodhaven?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day ant control service throughout Woodhaven and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Our team is familiar with the area from Forest Park to Atlantic Avenue and can respond quickly to urgent ant infestations.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets in Woodhaven homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved ant control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in Woodhaven's multi-family homes and provide clear instructions for re-entry times to ensure complete safety.
